summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. Only #89172 had usable hydrated live state; it is an open, focused Feishu PR that should remain open for maintainer review. The remaining listed PRs were unavailable in the preflight artifact because GitHub API rate limits prevented hydration, so no closure, label, comment, merge, or fix action is safe for them in this run.
